title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 41.450 - State defense force, how equipped
text:
41.450.  State defense force, how equipped. — Arms, uniforms and equipment for the federally recognized components of the organized militia shall be provided as prescribed in applicable tables of equipment and tables of organization of the United States Armed Forces.  The Missouri state defense force, when organized, shall be armed, uniformed and equipped as prescribed by the governor.
(RSMo 1939 § 15067, A.L. 1951 p. 654 § 36, A.L. 2018 H.B. 1469 merged with H.B. 1503) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 13874; 1919 § 7389
